expectations.text: Agent uses parse_tracker.py to show project status summary
expectations.evidence: Did not use parse_tracker.py. Read tracker.html directly and computed status manually.

expectations.text: Agent makes a strategic decision about which phase to prioritize
expectations.evidence: Identified Couple Features as the critical MVP gap and chose to work on partner dashboard.

expectations.text: Agent explains reasoning for phase choice (not just picking lowest %)
expectations.evidence: Noted that couple features are 'the biggest gap' and 'core CoupleFlow differentiator'. Brief but valid reasoning.

expectations.text: Agent completes at least one full task cycle with verification
expectations.evidence: Built partner-dashboard.tsx, ran TypeScript check, added navigation. Full cycle completed.
